archimate:DataObject.name: Digital Europe Thesaurus
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The Digital Europa Thesaurus (DET) is a multilingual thesaurus covering the main subject matters of the European Commission's public communications.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: Publications Office of the European Union
Source: https://op.europa.eu/en/web/eu-vocabularies/det
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Reference Data
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DigitalEuropeThesaurusDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DigitalEuropeThesaurusDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ReferenceData

properties.value: Publications Office of the European Union
The Digital Europa Thesaurus (DET) is a multilingual thesaurus covering the main subject matters of the European Commission's public communications.
